login.title: Cario
login.lead: Taxi fleet management — sign in to continue.
login.checkEmail: Check your e-mail inbox for confirmation.
login.resetSentSuccess: ✅ Check your email inbox — we sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must have at least 6 characters.

roleSelection.title: Choose account type
roleSelection.lead: Tell us who you are to finish registration.

pageMeta.defaultDesc: Cario: fleet management for taxi owners and drivers — vehicles, documents, alerts, and marketplace.
pageMeta.loginDesc: Sign in to Cario to manage your fleet, documents, and marketplace listings.
pageMeta.panelDesc: Today’s priorities and fleet overview in Cario.
pageMeta.fleetDesc: Browse and manage vehicles in your Cario fleet.
pageMeta.carDesc: Documents, costs, and listing details for this vehicle in Cario.
pageMeta.statsDesc: Profitability and fleet metrics in Cario.
pageMeta.settingsDesc: Company profile and notifications in Cario.
pageMeta.marketplaceDesc: Browse available rental cars on the Cario marketplace.
pageMeta.driverApplicationsDesc: Track your marketplace applications in Cario.
pageMeta.ownerApplicationsDesc: Review driver applications to your listings in Cario.
pageMeta.ownerEmploymentRequestsDesc: End of cooperation or a car-change signal — owner confirmations in Cario.
pageMeta.wizardDesc: Add a new vehicle to your fleet in Cario.
pageMeta.noCarDesc: No active car assignment in Cario — contact your fleet owner.
pageMeta.servicesDesc: Car service directory in Cario — Warsaw area, ratings and contact.
pageMeta.aiManagerDesc: Cario AI assistant for conversational fleet management.

panel.title: Attention today
panel.newApplicationsHint: Drivers are applying to your marketplace cars.
panel.newEmploymentRequestsHint: A driver wants to end cooperation or signals a car change — confirm or decline.
panel.publicProfileHint: Share this link in driver groups to find workers.

publicFleet.empty: No available cars at the moment.

fleet.title: My cars
fleet.attentionLegend: On each car: 📋 marketplace applications, 🤝 cooperation requests, 💬 chat where the driver sent the last message (needs your reply).

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.lead: Documents due within 30 days — most urgent first.
alerts.emptyText: No deadlines in the warning window.

services.successAdded: Thank you! The service has been added.
services.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Specializes in Toyota hybrids, quick turnaround

marketplacePhotos.heroLead: Visible to you and on the marketplace. Four required angles — the first becomes the listing thumbnail.
marketplacePhotos.tip2: Place the car on a clean, simple background
marketplacePhotos.tip3: The first shot (front-left) will be the listing thumbnail
marketplacePhotos.tip4: A clean car gets more enquiries from drivers
marketplacePhotos.plateBlurCheckbox: Blur the lower licence-plate area (estimate) before uploading
marketplacePhotos.plateBlurHint: For “Front left” and “Rear right” a preview opens: adjust the green box, then upload. It is still approximate; you can use “Upload without blur” for a single photo.
marketplacePhotos.platePreviewTitle: Blur licence plate — adjust the box
marketplacePhotos.platePreviewLead: Drag the middle of the box to move it; drag corners to resize. The inside area will be strongly blurred before upload.
marketplacePhotos.platePreviewTouchHint: On a phone, drag like a mouse; avoid starting the gesture on scrollable page chrome.
marketplacePhotos.qualityTipNone: Add photos to attract more drivers

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.driverLead: Browse listings and contact the fleet.
marketplace.viewCountAria: Total times this listing was shown in the catalog: {{count}}
marketplace.contactEmpty: The owner did not add a phone or Telegram to the listing.
marketplace.applyPrefillHint: Details from your profile (update them in Profile before sending):
marketplace.applySuccess: ✅ Application sent! The owner will contact you soon.
marketplace.applySentContactPrompt: Your application has been sent! Contact the owner:
marketplace.profileIncompleteApplyBanner: Add your name and phone to send an application.
marketplace.noEmail: No contact email yet (Settings → contact email).
marketplace.emptyDriver: No cars available right now. Check back later 🚗
marketplace.filteredEmpty: No cars match the selected filters.
marketplace.ownerLead: Turn listings on or off. Edit a car for full listing details.
marketplace.roleUnsupported: This page is for drivers and fleet owners.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: ❤️ No favorite cars yet. Add cars from marketplace!

fleetDoc.legend: OC/AC · Inspection · Service — colour by days / service

errors.applicationOwnerMissing: Missing owner data for this car — refresh the list or try again later.

push.text: Enable push reminders for document deadlines?

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsHint: Send a reminder (push / e-mail via Edge) when exactly this many days remain until expiry:
settings.emailCheckbox: Enable e-mail (requires RESEND_API_KEY on Edge + deployed notify-documents)
settings.companyLogoHint: Upload a logo for your public profile.
settings.referralLead: Invite other fleet owners to Cario. 1 active referral = +1 month of PRO.

aiManager.title: AI Manager
aiManager.proOnly: This feature is available in the Pro plan.
aiManager.ownerOnly: Available only for fleet owner accounts.
aiManager.proItem1: Add a vehicle from your chat description
aiManager.proItem3: Update mileage and show key stats
aiManager.photoPrompt: Analyze this insurance/registration document and extract: expiration date, policy/registration number, and car make/model if visible. Reply in JSON format.
aiManager.photoConfirm: Do you want to add this data to a vehicle?
aiManager.welcome:
Hi! I'm your AI fleet manager. I can help you:
• Add a new car — just send details
• Check documents — ask "which documents are expiring?"
• Update mileage — say "WX4821K has 125000 km"
• Analyze a document photo — send a photo 📎

How can I help?

errors.missingPlate: Plate number is required to add a vehicle.
errors.invalidDocumentField: AI returned an unsupported document field.
errors.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.

banner.title: Install Cario
banner.subtitleIos: Tap □↑ and choose “Add to Home Screen”
banner.subtitleAndroid: Tap ⋮ and choose “Add to Home screen”

settings.iosStep2: Tap the share icon (□↑) at the bottom of the screen
settings.iosStep3: Scroll down and choose “Add to Home Screen”
settings.androidStep2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right corner

update.available: A new app version is ready.

wizard.title: New car
wizard.docHint: Document dates — you can fill them in later when editing the car.
wizard.doneLead: We will keep an eye on the documents.

carDetail.marketplaceDriverHint: A car with an assigned driver cannot be listed — unassign the driver to enable the listing.
carDetail.sectionPublicNote: ℹ️ This information is visible to everyone on the marketplace.
carDetail.sectionPhotosLead: Visible to you and on the marketplace. Required angles and progress below.
carDetail.applicationsEmpty: No pending applications for this vehicle.

handover.sectionLead: Official record of vehicle condition at handover or return. Take clear photos on site.
handover.saveSuccess: ✅ Protocol saved! Photos are stored safely.

carForm.driverTakenError: This driver is already assigned to another vehicle.
carForm.marketplaceDriverHint: Remove the driver assignment to enable a listing.
carForm.appsAvailableLabel: Ride-hailing apps available through this partner

stats.title: Statistics
stats.lead: Fleet income and costs — step 1 of analytics.
stats.chartHint: Bar width reflects margin % (negative margins show as short red bars).
stats.trendNote: Each column uses the current fleet: sum of weekly rent for cars with a driver (no historical data yet).
stats.idleCostCard: Cars without a driver cost you {{amount}} per month (estimate).
stats.forecastEmpty: No OC/AC insurance or technical inspection due in the next 30 days.
stats.insightsEmpty: No tips for the current data.
stats.insightNoCost: ⚠️ {{plate}} — no cost data. Fill in costs to see profitability.
stats.insightIdle: 💡 You have {{n}} car(s) without a driver. List them on the Marketplace and earn about {{amount}}/month extra.
stats.insightLowMargin: 🔴 {{plate}} has a low margin ({{pct}}%). Consider raising rent or cutting costs.
stats.insightAllProfitable: 🎉 All cars are profitable — great fleet management.

driverProfile.title: Driver profile
driverProfile.lead: Fill in your details so owners can approve you quickly.
driverProfile.incompleteBanner: Complete your profile to submit applications.
driverProfile.avatarHint: Tap to add a photo from your gallery or camera.
driverProfile.docPhotoVisibility: The photo is only visible to the fleet owner after your application is accepted.
driverProfile.previewTitle: Profile card preview (what the owner sees)
driverProfile.previewHint: After saving, your data will update in applications.

driverEmployment.changeCarBtn: I want a different car (no auto unassign)
driverEmployment.pendingHint: The owner must confirm release from the car or respond to your change signal.
driverEmployment.modalTerminateLead: Choose a reason — it will be stored when you are released from the car.
driverEmployment.modalChangeLead: This is only a signal to the owner — no automatic reassignment. You can keep working on this car until you agree otherwise.
driverEmployment.successTerminateSubmitted: Request sent — waiting for the owner to confirm.
driverEmployment.successChangeSubmitted: Intent sent — waiting for the owner’s response.

reasons.reason_change_vehicle: I want to work on a different car

employmentRequests.title: Driver cooperation requests
employmentRequests.lead: Releasing a driver from the car needs your confirmation. A car-change signal does not unassign the driver automatically.
employmentRequests.emptyFiltered: No requests for the selected car.

driverApplications.title: My applications
driverApplications.empty: You have not sent any applications yet.

ownerApplications.title: Driver applications
ownerApplications.lead: Chat with drivers, reject an application, or — after you agree — assign them to the car from the chat.
ownerApplications.assignInChatHint: To assign to the car: open the chat and use the button after you have talked to the driver.
ownerApplications.emptyHint: When drivers send applications, they will appear here.
ownerApplications.acceptedFlash: Driver assigned! You can now start the vehicle handover checklist.
ownerApplications.reassignBody: This driver is already assigned to another vehicle: {{plate}}. Are you sure you want to move them here?
ownerApplications.confirmReject: Reject this application? The driver will see it as rejected.
ownerApplications.filterCarChat: Filter: car {{plate}} — chat priority (reply to the driver).
ownerApplications.chatFocusHint: Cards labelled below are threads where the last message is from the driver.

applicationChat.title: Application chat
applicationChat.leadBadgeTitle: Where this contact came from (lead attribution)
applicationChat.empty: No messages yet — write the first one.
applicationChat.closed: This application is closed — chat is read-only.
applicationChat.assignLead: Talk in the chat first. When everything is agreed — assign the driver to this vehicle (the listing will leave the marketplace). Later this step can be linked to a handover / e-signature flow.
applicationChat.assignConfirm: Assign this driver to the car from this application? Other pending applications for this car will be rejected.
applicationChat.assignSuccess: The driver has been assigned to the car.
applicationChat.assignDoneNote: The driver is already assigned to this car. You can keep chatting.

alertPanel.title: Document alerts
alertPanel.legend: Colours: red — expired or <7 days, orange — 7–14 days, yellow — 14–30 days.

driverFinance.title: Driver finance
driverFinance.lead: Track income, costs, and progress toward your monthly goal.
driverFinance.requiredDaily: Required per day to hit goal: {{value}}
driverFinance.expenseSelectHint: Choose one or more categories and enter amounts.
driverFinance.partnerPayoutHint: Example: partner app fee about 170 PLN/week for weekly payouts, about 210 PLN for daily payouts — enter the amount for your chosen period.
driverFinance.calcExpensesAutoHint: If expenses field is empty, calculator uses expenses from selected period: {{value}}.
driverFinance.forecastOnTrack: You are on track to hit the monthly target.
driverFinance.forecastBehind: You are behind the target by {{value}} based on current pace.
driverFinance.tipSetGoal: Set a monthly target to track whether your pace is enough.
driverFinance.tipBehindGoal: To catch up, you still need about {{value}} this month.
driverFinance.tipTopExpense: {{category}} takes about {{pct}}% of your costs — optimize this first.
driverFinance.tipNegativeNet: Your net is negative this month. Reduce optional costs or increase gross rides.
driverFinance.tipStable: Finance trend looks stable. Keep this pace and monitor weekly shifts.
